QUARTZ_LISTENER_CONTEXT_ATTRIBUTE - Static variable in class io.goobi.viewer.model.job.quartz.QuartzListener
 
QuartzBean - Class in io.goobi.viewer.managedbeans
JSF application-scoped backing bean for the Quartz scheduler administration view.
QuartzBean() - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.managedbeans.QuartzBean
 
QuartzJobDetails - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.job.quartz
Data transfer object that carries runtime details of a Quartz scheduler job, including its name, group, previous and next fire times, cron expression, and paused state.
QuartzJobDetails() - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.job.quartz.QuartzJobDetails
 
QuartzListener - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.job.quartz
Servlet context listener that initializes and shuts down the Quartz scheduler on application startup and shutdown.
QuartzListener() - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.job.quartz.QuartzListener
 
QuartzListener(IDAO, Configuration, MessageQueueManager) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.job.quartz.QuartzListener

QueryListFunctionality - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.itemfunctionality
CMS item functionality that renders a list of records matching a configurable Solr query.
QueryListFunctionality(String, String) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.cms.itemfunctionality.QueryListFunctionality
 
QueryResult - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.search.query
Immutable value object holding the result of a parsed search query, containing the user-facing display string, the internal Solr query, extracted search terms, and the proximity distance.
QueryResult(String, String, Map<String, Set<String>>, int) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.search.query.QueryResult
 
Question - Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.crowdsourcing.questions
An annotation generator to create a specific type of annotation for a specific question.
Question() - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.crowdsourcing.questions.Question
Empty constructor.
Question(Campaign) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.crowdsourcing.questions.Question
Constructor setting the owning campaign.
Question(Question) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.crowdsourcing.questions.Question
 
Question(Question, Campaign) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.crowdsourcing.questions.Question
Creates a clone of the given question with the given campaign as owner.
Question(QuestionType, TargetSelector, int, Campaign) - Constructor for class io.goobi.viewer.model.crowdsourcing.questions.Question
Constructor setting the owning campaign as well as the type of annotation to be generated.
QUESTION_MARK_REPLACEMENT - Static variable in class io.goobi.viewer.controller.StringTools
Constant QUESTION_MARK_REPLACEMENT="U003F".
QuestionType - Enum Class in io.goobi.viewer.model.crowdsourcing.questions
The QuestionType determines GUI element to use to create annotations for a Question, which also determines the type of body the generated annotations have.
